overlay_content.name: Overlay Content
overlay_content.value: Genuine Nissan Accessories deliver original-fit performance for your Sentra. [*] Images shown for illustrative purposes only. For complete limited warranty details, see your Nissan dealer and read the vehicle’s Warranty Information Booklet.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
SENTRA EXTERIOR ACCESSORIES

Your look, your Sentra

Dial in your Sentra with Nissan Genuine Accessories — built to fit, made to last, and designed to elevate your style. No guesswork, no compromises — just the perfect pieces to make your signature Sentra.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
18" Black Machined Finish Wheels

  • Lightweight and strong aluminum-alloy
  • Black with machined finish accents
  • 18" 5-split spoke design

MSRP $610 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Rear Splash Guards

  • Contoured to match wheel openings, while helping prevent dirt and debris from nicking and scratching the finish
  • Add value and style while helping protect the sides of your vehicle

MSRP $84 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Door Cup Paint Protection

  • Transparent design provides protection without sacrificing style
  • Helps prevent scratches and wear on outside door cups
  • Includes four clear protectors for one vehicle set
  • Easy, tool-free installation

MSRP $47 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.value:
Black Rear Bumper Protector

  • Designed to help prevent scratches and scuffs when loading cargo
  • Easy, no-drill installation

MSRP $90 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

html_content.value:
Wheel Locks

  • Four Wheel Locks and coded Wheel Lock socket to help keep your wheels out of the wrong hands [*] Available only for vehicles with alloy wheels.

  • Superior durability, corrosion-resistant

MSRP $78 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
SENTRA INTERIOR, Lighting & Tech ACCESSORIES

Add your touch

Elevate your Sentra’s interior with Genuine Nissan Accessories — bold lighting upgrades, customized protection, and stylized details. Own every mile with a customized cabin that’s fresh, organized, and unmistakably yours.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Interior Accent Lighting

  • LEDs with 20 pre-programmed color options light up the front and rear footwells, cup holders, and console bin
  • Easily control light color and on/off function with a single knob
  • Works with the vehicle’s interior lighting when the door is opened

MSRP $400 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Illuminated Trunk Scuff Plates

  • Designed to prevent scratches and scuffs when loading cargo
  • Features stylish LEDs that help illuminate the trunk area
  • Durable stainless steel finish
  • Easy, no-drill installation

MSRP $465 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Door Pocket Lighting

  • Throw some light on those items you’ve tucked away
  • Door Pocket Lights work with the vehicle’s interior lighting when the door is opened

MSRP $125 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.
